manifest.description: Manage S3-compatible object storage (AWS S3, Aliyun OSS, MinIO)
assetType.oss.name: Object Storage
config.endpoint.title: Endpoint
config.publicEndpoint.title: Public Endpoint
config.publicEndpoint.description: Public-facing endpoint for generating presigned share URLs. Leave empty to use the endpoint above.
config.region.title: Region
config.bucket.title: Default Bucket
config.bucket.description: If set, this bucket is used by default for all operations.
config.pathStyle.title: Path-Style Access
config.pathStyle.description: Use path-style URLs (required for MinIO and some S3-compatible services)
config.accessKeyId.title: Access Key ID
config.secretAccessKey.title: Secret Access Key
tools.list_buckets.description: List all buckets in the storage account
tools.list_objects.description: List objects in a bucket with optional prefix filter and pagination
tools.get_object_info.description: Get metadata for an object (size, content type, last modified, ETag)
tools.download_object.description: Download object content (inline for small files, save dialog for large files)
tools.upload_object.description: Upload content or a file to the specified key in a bucket
tools.copy_object.description: Copy an object within the same bucket or to a different bucket
tools.move_object.description: Move an object to a new location (copy then delete source)
tools.delete_object.description: Delete a single object from a bucket
tools.delete_objects.description: Batch delete multiple objects from a bucket
tools.presign_url.description: Generate a time-limited presigned download URL for an object
policy.readonly.name: Read Only
policy.readonly.description: Allow listing and reading objects; deny delete and admin operations
policy.dangerous_deny.name: Deny Dangerous
pages.browser.name: File Browser
file.name: Name
upload.title: Upload File
upload.filePickerHint: A file picker dialog will open to select the local file.
presign.title: Presigned URL
